ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being tested */,
  "test_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test category */,
  "test_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test version */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to which the parameter belongs */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "typ" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., Voltage, Current) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter (e.g., manufacturer, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test associated with the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., environmental, operational) */,
  "condition_source" TEXT /* Source of the condition (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "condition_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result pertains to */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value obtained from the test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., pass, fail, warning) */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the result (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "result_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the lab (e.g., technician, engineer) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test associated with the log */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "log_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test associated with the failure */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the failure */,
  "failure_date" TEXT /* Date when the failure occurred */,
  "failure_type" TEXT /* Type of failure (e.g., hardware, software, environmental) */,
  "failure_source" TEXT /* Source of the failure (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "failure_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the failure (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "failure_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failures_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., voltage regulator, PWM controller) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was purchased */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_parameters" (
  "device_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device parameter association */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the device */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device parameter */,
  "parameter_source" TEXT /* Source of the device parameter (e.g., manufacturer, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limit record */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the limits */,
  "min_limit" REAL /* Minimum limit for the parameter */,
  "max_limit" REAL /* Maximum limit for the parameter */,
  "limit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter limit */,
  "limit_source" TEXT /* Source of the limit (e.g., manufacturer, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_limits_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the test category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "category_source" TEXT /* Source of the category (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test associated with the category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the test */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the link */,
  "link_source" TEXT /* Source of the link (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_category_links_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id")
)
